requirement_topic.en: Dominica Market Access — DBOS, IRC, DOMLEC, and Frontier EV Demand
requirement_topic.zh: 多米尼克市场准入——DBOS、IRC、DOMLEC及早期电动汽车需求
requirement_topic.zht: 多米尼克市場准入——DBOS、IRC、DOMLEC及早期電動汽車需求

summary.en: Dominica is an Eastern Caribbean OECS / CARICOM tourism economy with renewable-energy interest in geothermal and solar projects, but the EV market is essentially non-existent and should be framed honestly as a pilot-stage opportunity. DBOS is the national standards body, IRC regulates electricity utilities, and DOMLEC is the utility. Charger imports and deployments should be checked for DBOS conformity documentation, customs classification, DOMLEC connection approval, and site-owner requirements. Sea freight normally enters through Roseau / Woodbridge Bay, so packaging, corrosion protection, spare parts, and service support should account for Caribbean logistics.
summary.zh: 多米尼克是东加勒比OECS / CARICOM旅游经济体，对地热和太阳能等可再生能源项目有兴趣，但电动汽车市场基本尚未形成，应诚实定位为试点阶段机会。DBOS是国家标准机构，IRC监管电力公用事业，DOMLEC是电力公司。充电桩进口和部署应核实DBOS合格文件、海关归类、DOMLEC接入审批和场地方要求。海运通常经罗索 / 伍德布里奇湾进入，因此包装、防腐、备件和服务支持应考虑加勒比物流条件。
summary.zht: 多米尼克是東加勒比OECS / CARICOM旅遊經濟體，對地熱和太陽能等可再生能源項目有興趣，但電動汽車市場基本尚未形成，應誠實定位為試點階段機會。DBOS是國家標準機構，IRC監管電力公用事業，DOMLEC是電力公司。充電樁進口和部署應核實DBOS合格文件、海關歸類、DOMLEC接入審批和場地方要求。海運通常經羅索 / 伍德布里奇灣進入，因此包裝、防腐、備件和服務支持應考慮加勒比物流條件。

standards_or_laws: Dominica Bureau of Standards (DBOS) standards and conformity assessment functions
Independent Regulatory Commission (IRC) electricity utility regulation
Roseau / Woodbridge Bay sea-freight import route
OECS / CARICOM renewable-energy and tourism market context

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, GB/T 27930, China CCC where in scope, and domestic operator requirements. These documents can support a technical review, but they do not establish Dominica market access, IEC connector compatibility, DBOS conformity, DOMLEC connection approval, or service readiness for a small island tourism market.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、适用范围内的中国CCC以及国内运营商要求准备文件。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能证明多米尼克市场准入、IEC接口兼容性、DBOS合格、DOMLEC接入审批或面向小岛旅游市场的服务准备。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234、GB/T 27930、適用範圍內的中國CCC以及國內運營商要求準備文件。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能證明多米尼克市場准入、IEC接口兼容性、DBOS合格、DOMLEC接入審批或面向小島旅遊市場的服務準備。

gap.en: Before shipment, confirm importer responsibility, HS code, DBOS documentation expectations, DOMLEC site approval, IRC-regulated electricity treatment, IEC Type 2 / CCS2 connector scope, warranty spares, remote support, and coastal packaging via Roseau / Woodbridge Bay. Commercially, avoid assuming a mass EV charging market; target pilots for hotels, rental fleets, public agencies, airport transfers, ports, and renewable-energy demonstration sites.
gap.zh: 出货前须确认进口商责任、HS编码、DBOS文件预期、DOMLEC场站审批、IRC监管下的电力处理、IEC Type 2 / CCS2接口范围、保修备件、远程支持，以及经罗索 / 伍德布里奇湾的沿海包装。商业上不应假定存在大规模电动汽车充电市场；应面向酒店、租赁车队、公共机构、机场接送、港口和可再生能源示范场站等试点。
gap.zht: 出貨前須確認進口商責任、HS編碼、DBOS文件預期、DOMLEC場站審批、IRC監管下的電力處理、IEC Type 2 / CCS2接口範圍、保修備件、遠程支持，以及經羅索 / 伍德布里奇灣的沿海包裝。商業上不應假定存在大規模電動汽車充電市場；應面向酒店、租賃車隊、公共機構、機場接送、港口和可再生能源示範場站等試點。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — DBOS conformity, customs, DOMLEC connection approval, and IRC-regulated electricity requirements depend on product scope and site; EV market demand is policy and project context, not a product-standard waiver
mandatory_status.cn: China CCC or GB/T evidence may support review but is not a Dominica market-access approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Dominica is a frontier EV charger market. Treat sales as pilot projects requiring DBOS, DOMLEC, IRC, site-owner, logistics, and service planning; do not claim market readiness from China GB/T or CCC documents alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 多米尼克是电动汽车充电桩前沿市场。应将销售视为试点项目，并规划DBOS、DOMLEC、IRC、场地方、物流和服务事项；不得仅凭中国GB/T或CCC文件宣称已具备市场准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 多米尼克是電動汽車充電樁前沿市場。應將銷售視為試點項目，並規劃DBOS、DOMLEC、IRC、場地方、物流和服務事項；不得僅憑中國GB/T或CCC文件宣稱已具備市場准入。
